title: Teddy Bear Cookie Cutter 7-8cm | 3D Printed PLA Baking Tool | Cute Bear Fondant Stamp Kids Party Baby Shower
description:
Introducing our adorable Teddy Bear Cookie Cutter — the perfect tool for creating charming bear-shaped cookies, fondant decorations, and baked treats that everyone will love. Whether you're preparing for a baby shower, a child's birthday party, or simply baking a fun weekend batch of cookies, this cute teddy bear cutter will bring smiles to faces young and old.

This cookie cutter features a detailed teddy bear silhouette with clean, defined edges that produce beautifully shaped cookies every single time. The design captures the classic charm of a sitting teddy bear, complete with rounded ears and an unmistakable cuddly shape. It cuts through cookie dough, fondant, craft clay, and even soft cheese with ease, giving you versatile use far beyond the baking sheet.

Dimensions and Size Information
This listing is for our Medium (M) size cutter, which measures approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at its tallest point. The cutting depth is approximately 1cm, which is ideal for standard rolled cookie dough. This size is perfect for individual cookies, cupcake toppers, and decorative fondant elements. It fits comfortably in the hand and is easy for both adults and children to use during baking sessions.

Material and Food Safety
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. PLA is a plant-based, biodegradable thermoplastic that is widely used in food-contact applications. Please note that due to the nature of 3D printing, we recommend lightly flouring or spraying the cutter with cooking spray before each use to ensure a clean release.

How to Use Your Teddy Bear Cookie Cutter
Using this cutter is simple and fun. Roll out your cookie dough to an even thickness of about 5-8mm on a lightly floured surface. Press the cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then lift it straight up. If dough sticks to the cutter, dip the cutting edge in a bit of flour between cuts. For fondant work, use a thin layer of cornstarch instead of flour. Once your shapes are cut, transfer them carefully to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake according to your favorite recipe.

Perfect Gift Ideas
This teddy bear cookie cutter makes a wonderful gift for so many occasions. It is an ideal addition to a baby shower gift basket, paired with a cookie recipe card and some sprinkles for a thoughtful homemade touch. Baking enthusiasts, new parents, kindergarten teachers, and craft lovers will all appreciate this unique and practical present. It also makes a delightful stocking stuffer during the holiday season or a sweet party favor for a teddy bear-themed birthday celebration. If you know someone who loves spending time in the kitchen creating adorable treats, this is the gift that will spark their creativity.

Care Instructions
To keep your cookie cutter in the best condition, gently hand wash it in lukewarm water with mild dish soap after each use. Avoid soaking it for extended periods. Pat it dry with a soft towel and store it in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat sources. PLA can soften at temperatures above 60°C (140°F), so always keep it away from hot surfaces, ovens, and dishwashers.

About Our Shop
Every cookie cutter in our shop is lovingly designed and 3D printed to order in small batches, ensuring quality and attention to detail with each piece. We are a small, dedicated team passionate about combining creativity with practical baking tools that bring joy to your kitchen. Because each item is made to order, you are receiving a truly handmade product crafted just for you. We take pride in our work and are always happy to accommodate custom sizes or designs — just send us a message!
